nuggets.headline: billie eilish 'hated every second' of making her debut album
nuggets.text: Despite its massive success, Billie Eilish revealed she absolutely despised creating her debut album, 'WHEN WE ALL FALL ASLEEP, WHERE DO WE GO?'. She reflected, saying, "I hated every second of it. I hated writing. I hated recording. I literally hated it. I would’ve done anything else." She even thought there was no way she'd make another album after that difficult experience.

source.title: Billie Eilish says she "hated every second" of making her debut album
source.quoteSnippet: “I hated every second of it,” she said. “I hated writing. I hated recording. I literally hated it. I would’ve done anything else. I remember thinking there’s no way I’m making another album after this. Absolutely not.”

nuggets.imageCaption: Billie Eilish's debut album cover, a project she 'hated every second' of making.

nuggets.headline: the 'bad guy' beat contains a sydney pedestrian crossing sound
nuggets.text: That unique, minimalist production you're hearing in "bad guy" holds a surprising secret: it features the distinct sound of a Sydney pedestrian traffic light. Billie Eilish herself recorded the sound on her phone in February 2017, later incorporating it into the track.

source.title: Bad Guy (Billie Eilish song) - Wikipedia
source.quoteSnippet: In an interview with Rolling Stone, the use of a Sydney pedestrian traffic light sound in the song was revealed; it originates from a phone recording made by Eilish in February 2017.

nuggets.headline: billie eilish collaborated with justin bieber on 'bad guy'
nuggets.text: If this dark, playful track is hitting right now, you need to hear Justin Bieber's music. He actually collaborated with Billie Eilish on a remix of "bad guy," which was officially released in July 2019, just a few months after the original dropped.

source.title: Bad Guy (Billie Eilish song) - Wikipedia
source.quoteSnippet: Another version of the song, a collaboration with the Canadian singer Justin Bieber, was released on July 11, 2019.

nuggets.imageCaption: Justin Bieber collaborated with Billie Eilish on a remix of 'bad guy'.

artistSummary: Billie Eilish is an acclaimed American singer-songwriter, known for her unique dark pop style. She skyrocketed to global fame with her debut album 'WHEN WE ALL FALL ASLEEP, WHERE DO WE GO?', collaborating closely with her brother Finneas O'Connell.
